title: Parameters and return values — defining what goes in and what comes out
session_name: Python Foundations II and Calling an LLM

course.title: Python for AI, PE, VC and RAG

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Flow diagram showing the parameter→function body→return value pipeline: argument value at call site flows into the parameter slot in the def, the body processes it, the return keyword sends a value back to the caller where it is assigned to a variable. A second contrasting panel shows a function with no return, producing None.
